metadata.rule: Developers / oxidants are excluded. Analysis includes color shades, lighteners, mixers/correctors, and bond/color support products.

stylistProfile.title: Itzik Kirma – 2026
stylistProfile.signatureBehavior: Heavy multi-shade formulation, suggesting nuanced tone adjustment within services.
stylistProfile.summary: Itzik Kirma in 2026 is primarily oriented around color maintenance and coverage services, with L'OREAL PROFESSIONNEL, TO DEL., KEUNE driving most recorded color usage.
